title: Cosmos Step-808 — 16-step 808 drum + gliding sub-bass groovebox
summary: An 808-style drum + bass groovebox that makes REAL sound via the Web Audio API: a 16-step grid drives a synthesized 808 kick (a long sine with a pitch drop and a noise click), a noise+tone snare, filtered-noise hats, and a tunable sub-bass lane (an 808 sine bass with portamento glide between notes). A playhead sweeps the whole grid, hit cells flash, and the sub-bass note is drawn as a glowing pitch curve that slides between pitches. Self-contained, zero dependencies, runs offline, with a silent deterministic looping visual demo for capture.
usage_notes: RUN: open index.html and press SPACE to start/stop the groove to HEAR it (audio needs a user gesture). Click cells in the KICK/SNARE/HAT rows to toggle hits; click in the bass lane to toggle a note, drag vertically in the bass lane to set its pitch (snapped to a minor-pentatonic scale). KEY TECHNIQUES (synthesis): 808 kick = sine with an exponential pitch drop 150->45Hz plus a short noise click; snare = highpassed noise burst + triangle tone; hat = highpassed noise; sub-bass = a single persistent sine through a lowpass with per-step gain envelopes and exponential frequency ramps for glide; pitch = 27.5*2^((midi-21)/12), master gain ~0.2 with a compressor and ramped envelopes (no clicks); a look-ahead scheduler clocks the 16 steps. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 is SILENT + window.__seek(t) deterministic visual — a seeded trap groove plays silently with the playhead sweeping, kick/snare/hat cells flashing, and the 808 bass glow gliding between pitches, looping seamlessly; START offsets frame 0 to mid-groove. TUNE: LOOP for tempo, the seeded drums/bass pattern init, BASEMIDI for bass register, STEPS for length.
summary_vi: Hộp nhịp trống + bass kiểu 808 phát ra âm thanh THẬT qua Web Audio API: lưới 16 bước điều khiển kick 808 tổng hợp (sine dài có rớt cao độ và tiếng click), snare, hi-hat và một làn sub-bass chỉnh được (bass sine 808 trượt cao độ giữa các nốt). Đầu đọc quét toàn lưới, các ô gõ lóe sáng, và nốt sub-bass vẽ thành đường cong cao độ phát sáng trượt giữa các cao độ. Tự chứa, không phụ thuộc, kèm bản demo hình lặp tất định im lặng để chụp.
notes: Mở ra rồi bấm phím cách để nghe groove 808; nhấp các ô trống, kéo dọc làn bass để chỉnh cao độ.
